name: Peanut Butter Delight
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Graham cracker wafers, crushed finely
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the finest grain powdered sugar for this recipe and graham cracker crumbs should be ground to a fine powder.
2. Cream margarine, peanut butter & sugar until smooth. Blend in graham cracker crumbs & vanilla, mix well.
3. Spread evenly in 9-inch square pan and chill.
4. Melt the chocolate and margarine and pour over. Chill until it looks dull (about 30 minutes).
5. Score and cut with a sharp knife.
